response.original_title: Star Wars: The Clone Wars - Siege of Mandalore
response.overview: As the galaxy teeters on the brink of a dark transformation, former Jedi Padawan Ahsoka Tano returns to the front lines. In a desperate bid to liberate the planet Mandalore from the iron grip of the resurrected Sith Lord Darth Maul, she leads an elite division of the 332nd Company in a spectacular planetary invasion.  What begins as a mission of liberation turns into a race against time as the shadow of the mysterious Darth Sidious stretches across the stars. While the bond between Anakin Skywalker and Obi-Wan Kenobi is tested in the furthest reaches of space, Ahsoka must forge her own path between duty and survival.  When the infamous Order 66 is executed, the mission shifts from a heroic struggle for freedom to a heartbreaking fight for life. Nothing will ever be the same.
response.tagline: The war comes to an end
response.title: Star Wars: The Clone Wars - Siege of Mandalore
